evals.prompt: I have a PRD for NoteFlow, a browser-based note-taking app. Please generate a complete MVP architecture document using the default Next.js + ShadCN stack. I want the architecture to be detailed enough that I can combine it with the PRD and implement the whole thing in one coding session.
evals.expected_output: The skill should read the PRD, confirm the default stack, and produce a prescriptive architecture document covering project structure, components, theming, i18n, data model, testing strategy with Vitest and Playwright patterns, and an implementation roadmap.

evals.prompt: Here is a PRD for an internal support tool. I want the architecture document but I need to use Vue instead of Next.js and Cypress instead of Playwright. Can you interview me about the changes and still produce a complete architecture?
evals.expected_output: The skill should detect the stack swap, interview the user about Vue-specific conventions and Cypress setup, and produce an equally prescriptive architecture document adapted to the different stack while keeping the same structure.

evals.prompt: Generate an MVP architecture from this PRD. I especially care about the testing section — I want example test files for unit, integration, and e2e that I can copy-paste as starting points. Also make sure the theming supports at least 4 color themes plus dark mode.
evals.expected_output: The skill should produce an architecture document with an expanded testing section including ready-to-use test templates for all three levels, and a theming section with 4+ color themes defined in CSS variables with dark mode variants.
